marketing__hero_mosaic__alt_hug: Couple embracing on their wedding day
marketing__vs__traditional-guest-book__t: Blank pages guests dutifully sign — and no one ever opens again.
marketing__vs__traditional-guest-book__g: No voice, no photos, no video
Sits in a drawer after the wedding
marketing__vs__traditional-guest-book__w: Guests leave voice messages that sound like the person, not their handwriting
Every entry is transcribed and searchable
Auto-generates a printed keepsake book you actually revisit
marketing__vs__video-guest-book-apps__ta: Videos only, awkward for older guests, no keepsake.
marketing__vs__video-guest-book-apps__ga: App downloads required in most cases
marketing__vs__video-guest-book-apps__wi: Voice, video, photo, and note — guests pick what feels right
Physical Gold Book keepsake ships to your door
marketing__vs__wedshoots__tagline: Guest photo aggregator — great photos, no voices.
marketing__vs__wedshoots__strength_1: Aggregates guest photos in one album
marketing__vs__wedshoots__win_1: Voice is the point — capture the tremor in Grandma's toast, not just her photo
marketing__vs__wedshoots__win_2: Photos AND notes AND voices, in one book
marketing__vs__guestpix__tagline: Wedding photo sharing without the wedding-book output.
marketing__vs__guestpix__win_1: Every message type in one place
marketing__vs__zola__tagline: Full planning stack — guest book is a feature, not the focus.
marketing__vs__zola__strength_1: Registry, website, and planning all in one
marketing__vs__zola__gap_2: No voice, no video, no printed keepsake
marketing__vs__zola__gap_3: Guest book is buried inside the website
marketing__vs__zola__win_2: Pairs with any wedding website (including Zola)
marketing__vs__zola__win_3: Physical keepsake, not just a webpage
marketing__vs__the-knot__tagline: Big-brand planning site — no dedicated guest-voice product.
marketing__vs__the-knot__gap_1: Guest book is a comment feed, not a keepsake
marketing__vs__the-knot__win_1: Ovation focuses on one thing: making guest voices last
marketing__use_case__voice-guest-book__t: A wedding guest book made of voices
marketing__use_case__voice-guest-book__s: Every guest can leave a voice message. Auto-transcribed. Printed as a keepsake.
marketing__use_case__voice-guest-book__p: Traditional guest books collect signatures and one-line congratulations that fade the moment they're written. You lose the tone, the tremor, the accent, the laugh.
marketing__use_case__voice-guest-book__s: Guests scan a QR code, speak into their phone (30-second cap by default), and Ovation transcribes it in the language spoken. Every message goes into your book — with the audio file preserved forever.
Print your QR card and place it at the entrance, reception, or table cards.
Guests scan, tap 'Voice message,' and speak. No app needed.
You revisit the messages any time, and download originals whenever you want.
marketing__use_case__voice-guest-book__f: Do guests need to download an app?
No. Every message method — voice, video, photo, note — works from the phone's browser.
The default cap is 30 seconds, adjustable up to 2 minutes per message. Guests can leave multiple messages.
What if a guest speaks a different language?
We auto-transcribe in the language spoken. Over 40 languages supported.
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__title: Collect every guest photo — without an app download
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__subti: Guests scan your QR code and upload photos to your book. No downloads, no lost albums.
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__probl: Guests take amazing candid photos that sit forever on their phones. Shared albums require downloads or platform sign-ups nobody wants.
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__solut: One QR code, all your guests' photos in one place — right next to their voice messages and notes. Originals are downloadable as a ZIP.
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__step_: Guests scan the same QR you use for voice messages.
They tap 'Upload photos' and pick from their camera roll.
Photos land in your book, tagged with the guest's name if they entered it.
Download originals any time in a single ZIP.
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__faq_1: How many photos can guests upload?
20 per guest by default — adjustable per plan.
marketing__use_case__guest-photos__faq_2: No. Originals are kept full-resolution and are downloadable.
marketing__use_case__thank-you-cards__ti: Send thank-you cards that reference each guest's actual message
marketing__use_case__thank-you-cards__su: Ovation gives you the exact quote from each guest to thank them for.
marketing__use_case__thank-you-cards__pr: Writing 100 thank-you cards from a spreadsheet of gifts feels transactional. The moments guests actually offered you — the toast, the note, the photo — get lost.
marketing__use_case__thank-you-cards__so: Each guest's contribution is stored with their name. Reference their message in the thank-you card and it lands with the weight of a memory, not a receipt.
marketing__use_case__thank-you-cards__st: After the wedding, export the guest list with quoted highlights.
Reference each guest's message in your thank-you card.
Optional: order printed cards with the Ovation postcard bundle.
marketing__use_case__thank-you-cards__fa: Can I export just one guest's messages?
Yes. Search by name, filter to their entries, and copy or export.
marketing__use_case__wedding-toasts__tit: Save every wedding toast — the ones spoken and the ones missed
marketing__use_case__wedding-toasts__sub: Guests who couldn't be there record a toast at home. Guests at the wedding can too.
marketing__use_case__wedding-toasts__pro: The best toasts aren't always at the reception. A grandmother who couldn't fly in, a friend too shy at the mic, a father who chokes up — their words are missed.
marketing__use_case__wedding-toasts__sol: Ovation captures toasts from anyone, anywhere. Pre-wedding recordings for those who can't attend. Post-toast recordings from those who wanted to speak but didn't.
marketing__use_case__wedding-toasts__ste: Send the guest link ahead of time to loved ones who can't attend.
Include a QR at every reception table for spontaneous toasts.
All toasts, from anywhere, land in the same book.
marketing__use_case__wedding-toasts__faq: Yes. Voice, video, photo, note — guests pick.
marketing__use_case__multi-language-wedd: Capture every language your guests speak
Ovation transcribes each message in the language it's spoken. Perfect for multi-cultural weddings.
Weddings bring families together across languages. Traditional guest books force everyone into the wedding's 'main' language — losing the intimacy of a grandmother's mother tongue.
Guests record in whatever language feels natural. Ovation auto-transcribes in that same language, then optionally offers a translated version for the couple.
Guest speaks in their language of choice.
Optional side-by-side translation in your language for the printed book.
40+ supported for voice transcription. All major European, Asian, and Middle Eastern languages.
marketing__hero__description: Ovation is a keepsake app for the people you love most. Guests scan a QR code and leave a voice or video message, a photo, or a written note. You revisit their voices whenever you want — for as long as you'd like.
marketing__how__subtitle: Designed so your 82-year-old grandmother can leave a message without asking anyone for help.
marketing__how__step1_body_v2: Pick your wedding date, add the couple names and a cover photo — that becomes your guests' welcome screen. Then download your QR code as a print-ready PDF, PNG, or SVG — one for every table.
marketing__how__step2_title: Guests leave a voice, video, or note
marketing__how__step2_body: They scan, pick a language, and choose how to share — 30–60 seconds of voice or video, or a written note. A photo snap can go with every message. No app to download — works on any phone made in the last 8 years.
marketing__how__step3_tag: For as long as you like
marketing__how__step3_body: After the wedding, every voice is in your inbox. Save favourites, order the Gold Book, or download a .zip of every original recording — your archive, kept on your own drive.
marketing__how__step3_quote: "Mi niña. I watched you dance tonight, and I saw your mother in every turn. She would be so proud."
marketing__sample__description: Typed wedding guest books fill up with "Congrats!!" Ovation captures the tremor in your father's voice, your best friend laughing mid-sentence, your grandmother switching to her mother tongue. Every message is auto-transcribed in the language it was spoken — and you can download every original recording any time.
marketing__sample__entry_label: Entry № 47 · Mas de la Calma, Girona
marketing__sample__quote: "Mi niña. I watched you dance tonight, and I saw your mother — God rest her — in every turn. She would be so proud. I am so proud. Live long and argue well, hija."
marketing__sample__author_role: Grandmother of the bride · Recorded in Spanish
marketing__features__lang_title: {count} languages, auto-transcribed in the language each guest spoke.
marketing__features__book_title: The Gold Book and more — letterpressed, vinyl, video montage.
marketing__features__book_shipping_v2: Printed and shipped by our print partner in 2–3 weeks
marketing__features__privacy_title: Private by default. You decide who sees what.
marketing__features__privacy_detail: HTTPS everywhere · GDPR rights · EU-hosted storage & database · Download your data anytime
marketing__features__invites_body: Design a matching digital invitation, import your guest list, and send each guest a personal link — their name is already on the page when they open it.
marketing__features__gallery_body: Share a private gallery link with your guests — they can browse, play a slideshow, and download their favourites. No accounts, ever.
marketing__features__kiosk_title: Turn an old iPad into a self-service message station.
marketing__features__kiosk_body: Locked fullscreen, PIN-protected exit, perfect for the welcome table.
marketing__features__planner_eyebrow: For the people who plan it
marketing__features__planner_title_v2: A print-ready QR card for every table, a dashboard for your planner.
marketing__features__planner_body_v2: Bulk-import your guest list, send each guest a personal invitation, and manage multiple events from one dashboard.
marketing__pricing__subtitle: Couples pay once. Professionals get a monthly plan that grows with their business.
marketing__pricing__keepsake_desc: The complete Ovation experience — every voice at your wedding, captured and online for a full year.
marketing__pricing__keepsake_feats__auto: Auto-transcribed in the language it was spoken
marketing__pricing__gold_desc_v3: The complete experience with two full years online — twice the time to relive every voice.
marketing__pricing__pro_starter_desc_v2: For individual creatives running up to 5 events per month.
marketing__pricing__pro_starter_feats__p: Print-ready QR cards for every event
marketing__pricing__pro_starter_feats__m: Manage all client events from one dashboard
marketing__pricing__pro_desc: For studios and teams running up to 20 events per month.
marketing__pricing_teaser__body: Couples pay once — from {couplePrice}, a full year online, and every recording downloadable forever. Professionals from {proPrice} / month.
marketing__faq__subtitle: Something missing? We answer every email within 4 hours — even on weekends, because weddings happen on weekends.
marketing__faq__q1: How does Ovation actually work on the wedding day?
marketing__faq__a1_v2: You download your QR code as a print-ready PDF, PNG, or SVG and print one card per table — or share your link by WhatsApp before the day. Guests scan with any phone, pick a language, and leave a voice or video message, a photo, or a written note. No app to download — works on iOS, Android, and any modern browser.
marketing__faq__q2: What about guests who are not tech-savvy, or elderly?
marketing__faq__a2: The record screen is one button. Typography is 28px minimum. Uncles, aunts and grandmothers make up ~40% of our messages — by design.
marketing__faq__q3: Can guests leave messages before the wedding?
marketing__faq__a3: Yes. Open the book any time before — guests can leave messages from the moment you create it.
marketing__faq__q4: How long do you keep the audio?
marketing__faq__a4_v3: For your storage window — 6 months on the free plan, 12 months on Keepsake, 24 months on Gold. Need longer? Extend month by month for {drePrice}, cancel whenever. And you can download a .zip of every original recording anytime — once it's on your own drive, it's yours forever.
marketing__faq__q5: Can we get a physical book?
marketing__faq__a5_v2: Yes — the printed Gold Book is a keepsake you order separately: a linen-bound volume of up to 180 pages with transcripts, favourite photos, and QR codes that play back each voice. It's sold, printed and shipped by our print partner through their secure checkout. Most couples order 3 copies.
marketing__faq__a6: Yes — private by default. Only your couple account can see your messages unless you choose to share a gallery. Everything is served over HTTPS and our storage and database are hosted in the EU; a small number of trusted providers (such as our audio transcription service) process data outside the EU under GDPR safeguards — see our Privacy Notice. We never train AI models on your data, never show ads, and never sell your data.
marketing__faq__q7: Can guests see each other's photos and messages?
marketing__faq__a7: Only if you want them to. Turn on the shared gallery and every guest gets a private link to browse the photos, play a slideshow, and download their favourites — no account needed. You can switch it off or regenerate the link at any time.
marketing__cta__description_v3: Set-up takes 10 minutes. Start free — capture up to 50 messages, keep them online for 6 months, and download everything anytime. Upgrade whenever you like for unlimited messages and up to two years online — or order the printed Gold Book from our print partner.
marketing__cta__disclaimer: No credit card required · cancel anytime
marketing__showpiece__quote: “You’ve built something so beautiful together — watching you both today, I kept thinking how lucky I am to call you my dearest friend.”
marketing__gold_book__description: The Gold Book is a premium printed record of every message your guests left — transcribed and laid out beautifully. Each spread includes a QR code that plays the original audio.
marketing__gold_book__feature1_body: Enough room for every voice, with room to breathe.
marketing__gold_book__feature2_body: Feels like the heirloom it will become.
marketing__gold_book__feature3_body: Scan any page to hear the voice behind the words.
marketing__gold_book__feature4_body: Every message auto-transcribed in the language it was spoken.
marketing__gold_book__ships_v2: Sold, printed and shipped by our print partner. Ships in 2–3 weeks.
marketing__changelog__description: Every update, every improvement — shipped with care.
marketing__changelog__empty_state: Ovation is in private beta with our first couples. From launch day, every update we ship will be published here.
marketing__for_planners__description: Wedding planners who partner with Ovation give every couple a voice-first guest book — no hardware, no app downloads, no friction. You focus on the day. We capture the words.
marketing__for_planners__benefit1_body_v: Create each couple's event and manage guests, invitations, QR codes, messages, and orders — all under your professional account.
marketing__for_planners__benefit2_body: Manage QR codes, guestlinks, and orders across all your events in one place.
marketing__for_planners__benefit3_body: Offer Ovation under your own brand with a custom domain and logo.
marketing__for_planners__benefit4_body: Dedicated onboarding and a direct line for day-of questions.
marketing__about__description: Ovation started with a voice note. One of our founders recorded a message at a friend's wedding, watched it get lost in a WhatsApp group, and thought: this deserved better. We built Ovation to make sure every voice finds its way home.
marketing__about__mission: To preserve the voices that matter most — not as text, not as photos, but as the sound of someone saying I love you in their own voice, in their own language, in the moment they meant it.
marketing__about__team_description: We are a small, international team who have attended more weddings than we can count and cried at most of them.
marketing__careers__description: We are a small team building something that matters. We work remotely across Europe, ship often, and believe deeply that the words people say at weddings deserve to outlast the flowers.
marketing__careers__value1_body: We have no fixed office. Our team is spread across Peja and Amsterdam.
marketing__careers__value2_body: We move fast and trust each other. No bureaucracy, no endless reviews.
marketing__careers__value3_body: Every pixel, every line of copy, every feature gets the attention it deserves.
marketing__careers__value4_body: We build things that matter to real people on the most important days of their lives.
marketing__careers__no_openings: No open positions right now — but we are always interested in hearing from exceptional people.
marketing__sustainability__eyebrow: What we know about our footprint
marketing__sustainability__description: We don't make sustainability claims we can't verify. Here is what we do know about how your keepsakes get made and shipped.
marketing__sustainability__commitment1_b: Books are printed through our print partner's European network and ship from the facility closest to your address — fewer kilometres per parcel.
marketing__sustainability__commitment2_b: Our print partner is Amsterdam-based with production across Europe, so most orders never cross an ocean.
marketing__sustainability__commitment3_b: No inventory, no waste. Every book is printed only when ordered.
marketing__sustainability__commitment4_b: We build for heirlooms, not for landfill. Quality covers, archival-grade paper options, lay-flat binding.
marketing__sustainability__footer_note: We are not perfect. But we are honest about where we are and serious about where we are going.
marketing__contact__title: We would love to hear from you.
marketing__contact__description: Questions, feedback, press, partnerships — reach us at the address below and we will reply within one business day.
marketing__keepsakes__description: From printed Gold Books to vinyl records and canvas prints — every format designed to make your guests' words last a lifetime.
marketing__keepsakes__product2_descripti: Your favourite messages cut to a 7" vinyl record.
marketing__keepsakes__product3_descripti: A 3-minute film of your guests' video messages.
marketing__keepsakes__product4_descripti: Instant access to all messages, photos, and transcripts.
marketing__keepsakes__product5_descripti: Personalised cards with a printed quote from a guest message.
marketing__keepsakes__product6_descripti: A single message, printed large on museum-quality canvas.
marketing__keepsakes__shipping_note_v2: All physical keepsakes are sold, printed and shipped by our print partner, and ship in 2–3 weeks.
marketing__privacy__intro_body: Ovation is a wedding guest-message platform — couples collect voice notes, video, photos and written messages from their guests. The service is operated by {legalEntityName}, {legalEntityAddress}, who is the data controller for the personal data described here. This notice explains, in plain language, what data we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have over it.
marketing__privacy__collect_body_v2: From you (the couple): your name, email address, password (stored as a hash), and the event details you enter — names, wedding date, venue, cover photo, slug. If you import a guest list, we store the names, email addresses and phone numbers you add so we can send invitations on your behalf, and we record whether each invitation was delivered and opened. If you order a physical keepsake, the purchase happens on our print partner Peecho's own checkout — Peecho collects the recipient name, shipping address and contact details needed to deliver it. From your guests: the name they type in, plus any voice recording, video, written note, or photo they choose to leave. Automatically: basic technical data such as IP address, browser, and the pages you visit, used to operate the service and prevent abuse. To diagnose problems, a small sample of visits may be captured as an anonymised replay of how the page behaved, with text and inputs masked.
marketing__privacy__use_body: Only to run the service: storing and showing you guest messages, transcribing audio, sending invitations and account emails, processing orders and payments, and keeping the site secure. We do not sell your data, do not show ads, and do not train AI models on your data.
marketing__privacy__share_body_v2: We rely on a small set of service providers, and each only sees what it needs to do its job: Cloudflare (content delivery, bot protection and file storage), our database hosting provider, Resend (transactional email), OpenAI (audio transcription — recordings are processed only to produce your transcript and are not used to train models), Paddle (payment processing for plans and subscriptions — Paddle is the merchant of record, so card and billing details go directly to Paddle and never reach our servers), Peecho (printed keepsakes — Peecho is the seller of record for physical orders and collects the payment, delivery name, address and contact details directly on its own checkout), Sentry (error tracking) and PostHog (product analytics and session replay — inputs are masked, and cookies are only set once you accept the analytics category in our cookie banner; in the EU/UK, we do not load PostHog until you consent). We don't share data with anyone else, and we never sell it.
marketing__privacy__rights_heading: Your rights and how to delete your data
marketing__privacy__rights_body: You can download all your data (audio, photos, transcripts, guest list) anytime from Settings → Data. You can close your account anytime from Settings — that permanently deletes your account, events, messages and files within 30 days. You also have the right to access, correct, restrict or object to our processing of your data, to receive a copy in a portable format, to withdraw consent, and to lodge a complaint with your data protection authority. To exercise any of these rights, email <link>{email}</link> and we'll respond within 30 days.
marketing__cookies__intro_body: We use cookies to make the site work — to keep you signed in, to remember your preferences, and to protect forms from abuse — and, once you accept the analytics category in the banner, to help us understand how the site is used and improve it. We don't use advertising cookies and we don't sell data to anyone.
marketing__cookies__essential_body: Cookies that keep you signed in and protect your session (including a CSRF token), short-lived cookies used during sign-up and sign-in (for example, to detect repeated failed attempts), and small preference cookies for your language, currency and light/dark theme. We also remember practical things like the last event you had open so the app can take you back to it. These are functional cookies — none of them track you across other sites, and disabling them will break sign-in.
marketing__cookies__third_party_body: Our payment provider (Paddle) and our anti-bot challenge (Cloudflare Turnstile) may set their own cookies when you interact with those specific flows — checkout and sign-in. Our analytics provider (PostHog) sets cookies for session continuity and session replay when you accept the analytics category in our cookie banner; in the EU/UK, PostHog is not loaded until you consent, and rejecting the analytics category stops recording and clears the state. Our error tracking (Sentry) does not set tracking cookies. Your browser's local storage is used for things like your cart and unfinished drafts; that data stays on your device.
marketing__cookies__contact_body: Email <link>{email}</link> with any cookie or privacy question and we'll get back to you.
coming_soon__description: Ovation is a keepsake app for the people you love most. Guests scan a QR code and leave a voice message and photo. You open one every morning — for as long as you'd like.
coming_soon__feature_1: Guests scan a QR code — no app to download
coming_soon__feature_2: One message every morning for 30 days
coming_soon__feature_3_v2: Auto-transcribed in the language it was spoken
coming_soon__waitlist__email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
coming_soon__waitlist__success_body: We'll email you when we launch.
coming_soon__waitlist__error: Something went wrong — please try again.
marketing__privacy__transfers_body: Our storage and database are hosted in the EU. Some providers process data outside the EU: audio recordings sent for transcription are processed by OpenAI in the United States, and error reports may be processed by Sentry in the United States. Where data leaves the EU we rely on GDPR transfer safeguards, such as the standard contractual clauses included in our agreements with those providers.
marketing__privacy__retention_body: Your account and event data are kept while your account is active. Guest audio, video and photos are stored for the period included in your plan — before it ends we warn you by email, and 30 days after expiry the media files are permanently deleted (you can extend storage or download everything first). Messages you delete are permanently removed within 7 days. Security logs are kept for up to 180 days and signed-in sessions expire after 7 days of inactivity. When you close your account, your data is permanently deleted within 30 days (see below); payment records are kept in anonymised form as required for accounting.
marketing__privacy__guests_body: Your message, recording or photo is collected for the couple who invited you — they decide who sees it and when it's deleted. If the couple added your contact details to their guest list, we use them only to send that couple's invitation, never for marketing. To have your message or details corrected or removed, ask the couple, or email us and we'll help. Ovation is not directed at children and we don't knowingly collect children's data.
marketing__privacy__changes_body: If we change this notice we'll update the date at the top, and for significant changes we'll email account holders before they take effect.
marketing__terms__intro_body: These terms are a contract between you and {legalEntityName}, {legalEntityAddress} — the company behind Ovation. By creating an account or using the service you agree to them. You must be at least 18, or the age of majority where you live, to create an account.
marketing__terms__service_body: Ovation lets couples collect voice, video, photo and written messages from their wedding guests, keep them in one place, and turn them into keepsakes. There's a free tier for trying things out, and features and limits — such as message counts and storage periods — depend on the plan you choose and are shown at purchase. Ovation is currently in beta, so features may change as we improve the service. You're responsible for your account and for keeping your password safe — let us know right away if you think someone else has access.
marketing__terms__content_body: Everything you and your guests upload stays yours (or your guests'). Guests keep ownership of what they leave; by submitting, they allow us and the couple to store and show it as part of the event. You give us permission to store, process and display uploaded content only as needed to run the service — for example transcribing a voice note, generating thumbnails, or laying out a printed book you ordered. We never sell your content, use it for advertising, or train AI models on it. You're responsible for making sure you and your guests have the right to share what's uploaded.
marketing__terms__acceptable_use_body: Use Ovation only for lawful purposes. Don't upload content that's illegal, hateful, or that infringes someone else's rights; don't attempt to break, overload or reverse-engineer the service; and don't use it to spam or harass anyone. Don't scrape or bulk-download other people's events, don't use bots or automation on public pages, and don't try to bypass access controls such as gallery codes or kiosk PINs. These rules also apply to guests leaving messages through an event link or kiosk. We may remove content or suspend accounts that violate these rules.
marketing__terms__payments_body_v2: Couple plans are one-time purchases. Professional plans and the storage extension are monthly subscriptions: they renew automatically each month until you cancel, and you can cancel anytime from Settings — you keep access until the end of the period you've paid for. If a renewal payment can't be collected, the subscription ends at the end of the paid period. Payments for plans and subscriptions are processed by our partner Paddle, the merchant of record — checkout, receipts and card details are handled by Paddle. Printed keepsakes are sold separately by our print partner (see "Physical keepsakes" below). Prices shown include applicable VAT where required. If something went wrong with a purchase, contact us and we'll make it right; statutory refund rights in your country are not affected.
marketing__terms__keepsakes_body_v2: Printed books and other physical keepsakes are sold, produced and shipped by our print partner, Peecho B.V. (Amsterdam), as the seller of record: when you order one, you buy it from Peecho through their secure checkout, and Peecho collects the payment, your shipping address and any applicable taxes. Delivery times are estimates. Custom-printed keepsakes are made to order, so change-of-mind withdrawal rights don't apply to them. If a keepsake arrives damaged or with a production defect, contact us with photos and we'll make sure it's reprinted or refunded. Please double-check your book preview before ordering — what you approve is what gets printed.
marketing__terms__storage_body: Each plan includes a storage period for guest media, shown at purchase. Before it ends we'll remind you by email; you can extend storage or download everything from Settings → Data. 30 days after a storage period ends, media files are permanently deleted. If you close your account, your data is permanently deleted within 30 days, as described in the Privacy Notice.
marketing__terms__liability_body: We work hard to keep Ovation reliable, but the service is provided "as is" and we can't promise it will always be available or error-free — please download copies of memories that matter to you. We're not liable for delays or failures caused by events beyond our reasonable control. To the extent the law allows, our total liability for any claim is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months before the claim. Nothing in these terms excludes liability that can't legally be excluded.
marketing__terms__termination_body: You can close your account anytime from Settings. We may suspend or terminate accounts that seriously or repeatedly violate these terms; where reasonable we'll warn you first and give you a chance to download your data.
marketing__terms__law_body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Kosovo, and disputes are subject to the courts there — unless the consumer-protection law of your country of residence gives you additional rights, which these terms don't limit.
marketing__terms__changes_body: Ovation will keep evolving — we may add, change or retire features. If a change materially reduces something you've paid for, we'll tell you in advance and offer a fair remedy. If we change these terms, we'll update the date at the top and email account holders before significant changes take effect. Continuing to use Ovation after that means you accept the updated terms.
marketing__terms__contact_body: Questions about these terms? Email <link>{email}</link> and a human will reply.
marketing__terms__ip_body: Ovation itself — the software, design, logo and brand — belongs to {legalEntityName} and its licensors. These terms don't give you any rights to our code or branding beyond using the service. If you send us feedback or suggestions, we may use them to improve Ovation without owing you anything.
marketing__terms__copyright_body: If you believe content on Ovation infringes your copyright, email <link>{email}</link> with a link to the content, a description of the work concerned, and evidence that you own it. We'll review promptly, remove infringing content where appropriate, and give the uploader a chance to respond. Accounts that repeatedly infringe may be terminated.
marketing__refunds__intro_body_v2: Payments for Ovation plans and subscriptions are processed by our partner Paddle, the merchant of record for all digital purchases. Printed keepsakes are sold separately by our print partner Peecho as the seller of record. If something went wrong with an order, contact us and we'll make it right. Nothing in this policy limits the statutory refund rights you have under the consumer law of your country.
marketing__refunds__subscriptions_body: Couple plans are one-time purchases. Professional plans and the storage extension are monthly subscriptions: they renew automatically until you cancel, you can cancel anytime from Settings, and you keep access until the end of the period you've paid for. If you were charged in error — for example a renewal you didn't intend or a duplicate payment — contact us within 14 days and we'll refund it.
marketing__refunds__keepsakes_body_v2: Custom-printed books and other physical keepsakes are sold, printed and shipped by our print partner Peecho, and are made to order — so change-of-mind withdrawal rights don't apply to them. If a keepsake arrives damaged or with a production defect, contact us with photos and we'll make sure it's reprinted or refunded — production defects are never on you.
marketing__refunds__how_body_v2: Email <link>{email}</link> from the address on your account and include your Paddle receipt (for plans) or your print order number (for keepsakes). We usually reply within one business day. Approved plan refunds go back to your original payment method via Paddle, typically within 5–10 business days; keepsake refunds are issued by Peecho to the payment method used at their checkout.

marketing__audience_photographers__subti: Refer Ovation to every couple. Their guests' voices land in a keepsake book — and you stay the visual storyteller of the day.

marketing__audience_venues__bullet_1: Preferred-partner pricing for every couple you refer

marketing__audience_venues__bullet_4: Zero on-site setup — guests scan and record from any phone

marketing__landing_b__hero_description: Photos, videos, voice notes and written wishes — gathered from everyone at your celebration and saved to one beautiful dashboard, live.
marketing__landing_b__product_title: Built to capture the whole day
marketing__landing_b__product_descriptio: Everything your guests send flows into one live dashboard — organized, backed up, and ready to keep.
marketing__landing_b__dashboard_descript: Every photo and message appears the moment a guest hits send. No app to manage, nothing to chase down after the wedding.
marketing__landing_b__phone_description: Guests scan a QR code and instantly add photos, record a voice note or write a wish, right from their own phone.
marketing__landing_b__phone_bullet_1: Works on any phone, no download
marketing__landing_b__phone_bullet_2: Photos, video, voice & text in one flow
marketing__landing_b__phone_bullet_3: Or run Kiosk mode on a tablet
marketing__landing_b__flows_description: One for your guests, one for you. Both take minutes — and everything connects automatically.
marketing__landing_b__guest_flow_step1_d: A guest points their camera at the QR code on the table — no app to install.
marketing__landing_b__guest_flow_step2_d: Upload photos & video, record a voice message, or leave a written wish.
marketing__landing_b__guest_flow_step3_d: Their memory lands in the couple's dashboard live, organized automatically.
marketing__landing_b__host_flow_step1_de: Name it, set the date, pick a cover — live in minutes.
marketing__landing_b__host_flow_step2_de: Print QR codes for every table, or run Kiosk mode on a tablet.
marketing__landing_b__host_flow_step3_de: Every photo, voice and note streams into your dashboard as it arrives.
marketing__landing_b__host_flow_step4_de: Turn your favorites into a premium hardcover Gold Book.
marketing__landing_b__collect_title: Every kind of memory, in one place
marketing__landing_b__collect_photos_bod: Unlimited uploads from every guest, gathered into one shared gallery automatically.
marketing__landing_b__collect_voice_body: Heartfelt voice messages recorded on the spot and saved beside every memory.
marketing__landing_b__collect_written_bo: Written notes and guestbook messages, kept together in your timeline forever.
marketing__landing_b__keepsake_title_lin: A hardcover book, made from your
marketing__landing_b__keepsake_descripti: Drag in your favorites and Ovation lays out a premium hardcover — with guests' voices printed as a scannable code on the page.
marketing__landing_b__final_cta_descript: Set it up in minutes. Invite everyone with a scan. Keep the memories forever.
